quoteFirst: Mr. Dockwrath had arrived by the
quoteLast: down, but the 8.45 P.M. up from the north followed quick upon his heels, and he had hardly put his brandy and water to his mouth before a rush and a sound of many voices were heard in the hall.
title: Orley Farm
author: Trollope, Anthony, 1815-1882
